persona_prompt:
You are filtering Boston events for Chloe, who wants upscale, interesting things to do in Boston.
She loves:
- Art: gallery openings, museum events, art shows, artist talks, art fairs, photography exhibits, sculpture
- Food & drink: wine tastings, wine dinners, chef's table experiences, cocktail classes, food festivals, upscale restaurant events, mixology
- Fancy experiences: galas, benefit dinners, charity auctions, cultural receptions, film premieres, theater openings
- Design, fashion, and aesthetics — runway shows, trunk shows, luxury boutique events, bridal showcases, couture
- Wellness and beauty events that are upscale (spa launches, product launches, brand events)
- Sip-and-craft events (sip & paint, pottery, floral arranging) — she likes these IF the crowd seems upscale or scene-y; skip if it reads as basic/suburban
- Anything cultured, beautiful, or scene-y
- Asian cultural events are great (she is Chinese and appreciates these)

SCORE 9-10 (must attend):
- "Fashionably LATE" Thursdays at The Liberty Hotel — weekly interactive runway with models weaving through the crowd, free admission, scene-y crowd
- Boston Fashion Week (Oct 2026) events, especially luxury eveningwear, couture, and accessory showcases
- Boston En Vogue — luxury gown and couture runway shows
- Trunk shows at luxury boutiques (Galia Lahav bridal, Agent Provocateur, Newbury St boutiques)
- SwimBoston — annual swimwear/bikini runway at Boston Harbor Distillery
- Any event at a Newbury St boutique, Back Bay gallery, or luxury hotel
- Museum opening receptions with cocktails or wine — Harvard Art Museums, MFA, ICA, Gardner — the "art party" type evening where the crowd is cultured and interesting, not just a museum visit
- University arts/cultural events at Harvard, MIT, BU that are open to the public and have a reception component

Lower priority for her:
- Pure civic/government/policy events (unless they're glamorous)
- Sports
- Basic networking mixers with no food/drink/art angle
- Sip-and-craft events at chain venues or with a generic/tourist vibe (score ≤ 4)

events.name: Fashionably Late Thursdays - 2026 Winter/Spring Season
events.description: Fashionably Late brings Boston's fashion scene to life.  Every Thursday, the hotel's lobby transforms into an interactive fashion show.
events.venue: Liberty Lobby at The Liberty Hotel
events.reason: Fashionably LATE Thursdays at Liberty Hotel — perfect match; weekly interactive runway, models, scene-y crowd, fashion-forward, free admission, weekly opportunity.

events.name: Spring Chef's Dinner
events.reason: Spring Chef's Dinner — upscale culinary experience, chef-focused, exactly matches Chloe's love of fine dining and chef's table experiences.

events.name: Champagne & Caviar Tastings
events.reason: Champagne & Caviar Tastings — luxury food and drink tasting, sophisticated, refined. Core interest for Chloe.

events.name: 40th Celebration: Opening Reception of Performing Conditions
events.description: Join us for the opening reception of the new exhibition at the List Center, Performing Conditions: Artistic Labor and Dependency as Form.
events.reason: Opening reception at List Center (MIT) for contemporary art exhibition. Museum opening reception with cocktails/wine, cultured crowd, art-focused — exactly Chloe's scene.

events.name: A Bel Canto Evening
events.description: Boston Summer Opera presents a live opera concert celebrating the beauty of the voice, and fundraising for our upcoming 2026 season.
events.reason: Opera concert and fundraiser — upscale cultural event with elegant atmosphere, live performance, and charitable component. Great for Chloe's refined taste.

events.name: Where Do I Go? لوين روح | Rania Matar
events.description: Join us for the opening reception of Rania Matar's photographic love letter to the women of Lebanon: Where Do I Go? لوين روح
events.reason: Opening reception for Rania Matar photography exhibition on Lebanese women — excellent art opening, meaningful cultural content, opening reception format with likely cocktails and upscale crowd.

events.name: Cocktail Competition
events.reason: Cocktail Competition — mixology/craft cocktails, competitive element, bartender/hospitality crowd. Highly relevant to Chloe's interest in upscale food and drink experiences.

events.name: Chef's Dinner: A multi-course dinner with Chef Marco Fortina
events.reason: Chef's multi-course dinner is exactly Chloe's style — upscale culinary experience with chef interaction

events.name: 2026 Spring Mfa Thesis Exhibition // Part I
events.reason: MFA Thesis Exhibition—university art opening, cultured crowd, aligned with Chloe's art passion

events.name: 2026 Spring Mfa Thesis Exhibition // Part I
events.reason: MFA thesis exhibition — museum-quality art event, likely opening reception with cultured crowd

events.name: Night at the Louvre: Art, Intrigue & a Modern Heist
events.description: Bestselling author Elaine Sciolino shares an intimate journey of discovery and revelation into the world’s most famous museum.
events.venue: French Library / Alliance Française of Boston & Cambridge
events.reason: Author talk on the Louvre by bestselling writer — intellectual, cultured, art-focused evening. Good fit for Chloe's love of art and cultural engagement.

events.name: Diva Royale - Drag Queen Dinner & Brunch Show Boston
events.description: Diva Royale - Drag Queen Dinner & Brunch Show Boston
events.reason: Drag dinner/brunch show — entertainment + dining experience. Scene-y, fun, culturally interesting venue (Diva Royale is well-known). Good for Chloe's appreciation of performance art and upscale nightlife.

events.name: OUTLET FRIDAYS @ Impeccable Art Gallery
events.description: Every Friday starting 4/10, tap into a space built for connection, collaboration & pure expression. Artists, Musicians, Photographers & More
events.reason: Gallery opening/artist community event (Fridays at Impeccable Art) — features artists, musicians, photographers in a gallery space. Scene-y, creative crowd focused on art and expression.

events.name: Paul Galbraith, guitar
events.reason: Classical guitar performance (Paul Galbraith)—upscale cultural event, refined audience

events.name: Gallery Highlights
events.reason: Gallery highlights tour — direct art/museum curation appeal

events.name: Berklee India Exchange presents Anirudh Varma Collective
events.reason: Berklee India Exchange performance — cultural event with music; Chloe appreciates Asian cultural events

events.name: 2026 Spring Mfa Thesis Exhibition // Part I
events.reason: MFA Thesis Exhibition — university art showcase, likely with opening reception; aligns with Chloe's love of art and museum events

events.name: Press & Pull: Two Decades at the Robert Blackburn Printmaking Workshop
events.reason: Printmaking workshop retrospective — art/craft focused exhibition, cultured crowd

events.name: Shen Yun
events.reason: Shen Yun is Chinese cultural performance — aligns with Chloe's heritage and appreciation for cultured, beautiful experiences

events.name: Presented by Lexus Broadway In BostonThe Outsiders
events.reason: Broadway show (The Outsiders) at upscale venue; cultured theater experience Chloe would enjoy

events.name: My Best Girl, Silent Film accompanied by Clark Wilson on the Mighty Wurlitzer Organ
events.venue: Hanover Theatre for the Performing Arts
events.reason: Silent film with live organ accompaniment is cultured, beautiful, scene-y — exactly Chloe's aesthetic

events.name: City Winery and Boston Comedy Festival Present: Comedy and Cabernet
events.reason: Wine and comedy pairing at City Winery — upscale food & drink venue with cultural entertainment, good scene potential

extra_events.name: MassChallenge Switzerland Awards 2026
extra_events.reason: Startup/accelerator awards ceremony — interesting crowd and venue potential, but description lacks details on whether it's upscale, has food/drink, or a scene-y atmosphere. Without confirmation of those elements, it's below Chloe's threshold.

extra_events.name: Boston Climate Week at Greentown Boston
extra_events.reason: Climate/sustainability focus at a nonprofit accelerator space. Civic interest but no indication of upscale food, drink, design, art, or fashion elements that would appeal to Chloe. Better fit for Brian's civic interests.

oyster_deals.name: Rochambeau — $1 oysters
oyster_deals.description: Back Bay. $1 oysters, Daily, 3:00 PM - 6:00 PM.
oyster_deals.reason: Rochambeau in Back Bay (her preferred neighborhood), daily 3–6pm happy hour with $1 oysters, good cocktail program and scene

oyster_deals.name: Bootleg Special — $1 oysters
oyster_deals.description: Back Bay. $1 oysters, Thursdays 5:00-10:00 PM; Fri-Sat late-night 10:00 PM.
oyster_deals.reason: Bootleg Special in Back Bay, $1 oysters Thu 5–10pm and late Fri–Sat, lively scene but more dive/casual vibe than her usual preference

oyster_deals.name: Sonsie — $1 oysters
oyster_deals.description: Back Bay. $1 oysters, Wednesday – Sunday, 3:00 PM - 4:00 PM.
oyster_deals.reason: Sonsie in Back Bay, upscale scene, $1 oysters Wed–Sun 3–4pm, good neighborhood and atmosphere

oyster_deals.name: Carrie Nation Cocktail Club — $1 oysters
oyster_deals.description: Beacon Hill. $1 oysters, Tuesday – Thursday, 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM.
oyster_deals.reason: Carrie Nation is upscale cocktail-focused in Beacon Hill, $1 oysters Tue–Thu 4–7pm, good drinks and atmosphere but not oyster-specific

oyster_deals.name: Ilona — $1 oysters
oyster_deals.description: South End. $1 oysters, Thursdays 5:00 PM - 1:00 AM; Fri-Sat 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM.
oyster_deals.reason: Ilona in South End (close to Back Bay), upscale French bistro, $1 oysters Thu 5pm–1am & Fri–Sat 4–7pm, good scene and drinks

oyster_deals.name: Petit Robert Bistro — $1 oysters (limit 16 pp)
oyster_deals.description: South End. $1 oysters (limit 16 pp), Monday – Thursday, 3:00 PM - 6:00 PM.
oyster_deals.reason: Petit Robert Bistro in South End, upscale French, $1 oysters Mon–Thu 3–6pm (limit 16), good atmosphere and proximity to her area

oyster_deals.name: Yellow Door Taqueria — $1 oysters
oyster_deals.description: South End / Dorchester. $1 oysters, Sundays, 12:00 PM until sold out ("Shuck It Sundays").
oyster_deals.reason: South End location is good for Chloe; Yellow Door has decent atmosphere for a taqueria. $1 oysters on Sundays is solid value, though not an upscale destination.

oyster_deals.name: Island Creek Oyster Bar — $1 oysters at the bar, select hours
oyster_deals.description: Kenmore. Standing deal: $1 oysters at the bar, select hours
oyster_deals.reason: Island Creek is quality, Kenmore location acceptable, $1 oysters is a good deal but venue is more casual than aspirational

oyster_deals.name: Woods Hill Pier 4 — Dollar oysters Mon–Wed 5–6pm
oyster_deals.description: Seaport. Standing deal: Dollar oysters Mon–Wed 5–6pm
oyster_deals.reason: Woods Hill Pier 4 is upscale seafood-focused with good atmosphere, Seaport location, $1 oysters Mon–Wed 5–6pm is excellent value at a destination restaurant

oyster_deals.name: Limani — $1 oysters
oyster_deals.description: Seaport. $1 oysters, Monday – Friday, 4:00 PM - 6:00 PM.
oyster_deals.reason: Limani in Seaport, upscale Greek seafood, $1 oysters Mon–Fri 4–6pm, good venue but not her top location preference

oyster_deals.name: Batifol — $1 oysters
oyster_deals.description: Kendall Square. $1 oysters, Daily, 4:00 PM - 6:00 PM.
oyster_deals.reason: Batifol in Kendall Square is an upscale French bistro with good wine program. Daily 4–6 PM happy hour fits her schedule, and the venue has enough polish to bring someone to. Not Back Bay but quality matters here.

oyster_deals.name: Waypoint — $2 oysters (Discounted)
oyster_deals.description: Harvard/Central. $2 oysters (Discounted), Tuesday – Saturday, 5:00 PM to close.
oyster_deals.reason: Waypoint (Harvard/Central) is a well-regarded seafood spot with decent atmosphere. $2 oysters Tue–Sat evenings is good value at a place she'd be okay visiting; not a standout but solid.

restaurants.name: Zuma
restaurants.editorial: High-energy Japanese izakaya in the Seaport. Known for a lively bar scene, beautiful room, and a crowd that dresses up. Popular for late dinner and drinks.

restaurants.name: Desnuda
restaurants.editorial: Intimate raw bar and natural wine spot. Industry crowd, low-key cool. East Boston location and Seaport outpost.
